ab: Manias, pasimulav ang saak isu-u tu ispapatas, mopa sipungul saak madas i ispapatas?
ch: A:Manias，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Manias, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka naak amin, issia nepi Tanivu tun.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Tanivu’s.

ab: Pasimulav ang saak tu muhiav, na kavava-ak masuqis.
ch: A:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Uu, siza-av simul.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Unin ang, taqu-av a Tanivu tu unin ang amin.
en: Thank you and thank Tanivu for me.

ab: Ma-aq su-u kilimun?
en: May I help you?

ab: Na masuqis saak dusa petasan.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Uu, heza ang su-u na asa-un?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Asa ang saak simul tau tu petasan.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Handii amin, ka-a tu sipungul masuqis is talti-un in.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: I-isaq naak a isqaqesqes a? ni-i ang asu mesuqis.
ch: M:我的橡皮擦呢？你還沒還我。
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Suqesuk in tu takna ki.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Mavia naak isqaqesqes tu is-uka tu.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Duuq is ispasimul in su-u ki Manias ta.
en: Did you lend it to Manias?

ab: Na niap qo, na tupa-uk nepa.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Tangusa siza inaak isqaqesqes tun maqesqes.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Tanivu, duuq sia Manias ta pesimul su-u pakahapavun tu hulus tun?
en: Tanivu, did Manias lend you this coat?

ab: Ni-i, sia tina naak a mebaliv penaak.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Mamaszang mu-u sia Manias ta pakahapavun tu hulus tu.
en: Manias’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Ni-i naam a patas mamaszang, mataqdung sia ta pakahapavun tu hulus sadu-an.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Tanivu, sinimul asu sia Manias tu sui?
en: Tanivu, did you borrow money from Manias?

ab: Uu, al suqesuk nepa haip dau ka, lusqa tu sipungul saak madas i sui.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Na laku-aq asu masuqis i?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Na suqesuk pesia ta kis kutun in.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Uu, na tupa-uk a Manias a.
en: Okay, I will tell Manias for you.
